channel.title: AI Press Review
channel.itunes:author: David Perron
channel.itunes:subtitle: Factual, Clear, Built for Busy Professionals
channel.itunes:summary: 80+ sources. 15 minutes. What matters in AI today.
channel.description: Tuesday through Friday at 7AM CET, AI Press Review distills 80+ global sources into a focused 15-minute briefing — filtered, weighted, and structured around six sections: AI News, Use Cases & Deployments, Tools & Practice, Weak Signals, Off the Radar, and Research. Built for professionals who need signal, not noise. Every Saturday: a weekly recap of the trends that defined the week. Also available in French at podcast.aequitus.net/fr.

item.title: Pentagon Signs Seven AI Firms, Big Tech Hits $725B Spend, GitHub Copilot Goes Per-Token
item.description: The Pentagon signed AI agreements with seven companies — including OpenAI, Google, Nvidia, and SpaceX — for any-lawful-use military deployment, while Anthropic was notably absent after refusing that standard. Sun Finance's AWS-powered identity pipeline cut per-document costs by 91 percent and slashed processing time from 20 hours to under 5 seconds, the week's sharpest deployment result. Next week, watch Qualcomm's investor day in June for its custom hyperscaler silicon reveal, and monitor whether Anthropic reaches a formal Pentagon agreement after the White House signaled it needs the company back in the fold.
item.content:encoded: The Pentagon signed AI agreements with seven companies — including OpenAI, Google, Nvidia, and SpaceX — for any-lawful-use military deployment, while Anthropic was notably absent after refusing that standard. Sun Finance's AWS-powered identity pipeline cut per-document costs by 91 percent and slashed processing time from 20 hours to under 5 seconds, the week's sharpest deployment result. Next week, watch Qualcomm's investor day in June for its custom hyperscaler silicon reveal, and monitor whether Anthropic reaches a formal Pentagon agreement after the White House signaled it needs the company back in the fold.
item.itunes:summary: The Pentagon signed AI agreements with seven companies — including OpenAI, Google, Nvidia, and SpaceX — for any-lawful-use military deployment, while Anthropic was notably absent after refusing that standard. Sun Finance's AWS-powered identity pipeline cut per-document costs by 91 percent and slashed processing time from 20 hours to under 5 seconds, the week's sharpest deployment result. Next week, watch Qualcomm's investor day in June for its custom hyperscaler silicon reveal, and monitor whether Anthropic reaches a formal Pentagon agreement after the White House signaled it needs the company back in the fold.

item.title: OpenAI on AWS, Anthropic at $900B: the cloud war heats up — Apr 30
item.description: OpenAI dissolved its exclusivity with Microsoft and landed on Amazon's Bedrock platform the following day, while Anthropic is fielding pre-emptive funding offers that would value it at up to 900 billion dollars. Vanguard deployed an AI tool called Expert Insights to serve tens of thousands of financial advisors with personalized portfolio guidance at scale. Practitioners should watch the Claude agent incident at PocketOS — a production database wiped in nine seconds — as the clearest live signal yet that agentic AI deployments require explicit execution guards before going live.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI dissolved its exclusivity with Microsoft and landed on Amazon's Bedrock platform the following day, while Anthropic is fielding pre-emptive funding offers that would value it at up to 900 billion dollars. Vanguard deployed an AI tool called Expert Insights to serve tens of thousands of financial advisors with personalized portfolio guidance at scale. Practitioners should watch the Claude agent incident at PocketOS — a production database wiped in nine seconds — as the clearest live signal yet that agentic AI deployments require explicit execution guards before going live.
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI dissolved its exclusivity with Microsoft and landed on Amazon's Bedrock platform the following day, while Anthropic is fielding pre-emptive funding offers that would value it at up to 900 billion dollars. Vanguard deployed an AI tool called Expert Insights to serve tens of thousands of financial advisors with personalized portfolio guidance at scale. Practitioners should watch the Claude agent incident at PocketOS — a production database wiped in nine seconds — as the clearest live signal yet that agentic AI deployments require explicit execution guards before going live.

item.title: OpenAI vs. Amazon: cloud war reshapes enterprise AI — Apr 29
item.description: OpenAI missed its internal revenue and user targets for Q1 2026 while simultaneously breaking free of Microsoft's cloud exclusivity to land on Amazon Bedrock, reshaping enterprise AI distribution overnight. Alibaba's Damo Academy deployed its Coca AI model across more than 27,000 CT scans, outperforming radiologists in early colorectal cancer detection. Practitioners should watch GitHub Copilot's shift to token-based billing in June and DeepSeek's new model priced 97% below OpenAI's latest — both will force immediate cost recalculations.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI missed its internal revenue and user targets for Q1 2026 while simultaneously breaking free of Microsoft's cloud exclusivity to land on Amazon Bedrock, reshaping enterprise AI distribution overnight. Alibaba's Damo Academy deployed its Coca AI model across more than 27,000 CT scans, outperforming radiologists in early colorectal cancer detection. Practitioners should watch GitHub Copilot's shift to token-based billing in June and DeepSeek's new model priced 97% below OpenAI's latest — both will force immediate cost recalculations.
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI missed its internal revenue and user targets for Q1 2026 while simultaneously breaking free of Microsoft's cloud exclusivity to land on Amazon Bedrock, reshaping enterprise AI distribution overnight. Alibaba's Damo Academy deployed its Coca AI model across more than 27,000 CT scans, outperforming radiologists in early colorectal cancer detection. Practitioners should watch GitHub Copilot's shift to token-based billing in June and DeepSeek's new model priced 97% below OpenAI's latest — both will force immediate cost recalculations.

item.title: DeepSeek vs. OpenAI: price war meets structural shift — Apr 28
item.description:
Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions.
DeepSeek launched its V4 model at 97% below OpenAI's comparable pricing, triggering a price war that is already forcing CFOs to rethink token-based AI cost models. Anthropic ran a fully automated internal marketplace where AI agents completed every transaction without human input across a full week of operation. Practitioners should watch DeepSeek's talent attrition — at least 10 contributors listed as departed in the V4 technical report — and the OpenAI-Microsoft restructuring, which drops the AGI clause and ends revenue-sharing.
item.content:encoded: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek launched its V4 model at 97% below OpenAI's comparable pricing, triggering a price war that is already forcing CFOs to rethink token-based AI cost models. Anthropic ran a fully automated internal marketplace where AI agents completed every transaction without human input across a full week of operation. Practitioners should watch DeepSeek's talent attrition — at least 10 contributors listed as departed in the V4 technical report — and the OpenAI-Microsoft restructuring, which drops the AGI clause and ends revenue-sharing.
item.itunes:summary:
Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions.
DeepSeek launched its V4 model at 97% below OpenAI's comparable pricing, triggering a price war that is already forcing CFOs to rethink token-based AI cost models. Anthropic ran a fully automated internal marketplace where AI agents completed every transaction without human input across a full week of operation. Practitioners should watch DeepSeek's talent attrition — at least 10 contributors listed as departed in the V4 technical report — and the OpenAI-Microsoft restructuring, which drops the AGI clause and ends revenue-sharing.

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Resets Open-Source Pricing, DOJ Backs xAI in Colorado, and AI Costs Outpace Headcount
item.description: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek released V4 Pro on Friday — a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight model priced at roughly one-fifth the cost of GPT-5.5, immediately pressuring proprietary model economics across the industry. On the deployment front, Meta signed a deal to run millions of AWS Graviton CPUs for agentic AI workloads, while Home Depot reported its AI voice agent identifies customer intent in ten seconds and resolves calls four times faster than legacy menu systems. Next week, watch for Anthropic's IPO valuation signals as the company navigates compounding product and pricing pressures, and monitor whether Colorado's AI regulation law survives the DOJ intervention filed Friday on behalf of xAI.
item.content:encoded: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek released V4 Pro on Friday — a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight model priced at roughly one-fifth the cost of GPT-5.5, immediately pressuring proprietary model economics across the industry. On the deployment front, Meta signed a deal to run millions of AWS Graviton CPUs for agentic AI workloads, while Home Depot reported its AI voice agent identifies customer intent in ten seconds and resolves calls four times faster than legacy menu systems. Next week, watch for Anthropic's IPO valuation signals as the company navigates compounding product and pricing pressures, and monitor whether Colorado's AI regulation law survives the DOJ intervention filed Friday on behalf of xAI.
item.itunes:summary: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek released V4 Pro on Friday — a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight model priced at roughly one-fifth the cost of GPT-5.5, immediately pressuring proprietary model economics across the industry. On the deployment front, Meta signed a deal to run millions of AWS Graviton CPUs for agentic AI workloads, while Home Depot reported its AI voice agent identifies customer intent in ten seconds and resolves calls four times faster than legacy menu systems. Next week, watch for Anthropic's IPO valuation signals as the company navigates compounding product and pricing pressures, and monitor whether Colorado's AI regulation law survives the DOJ intervention filed Friday on behalf of xAI.
